{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "&lrm;Quadri Advisory HR Services is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Administrative&nbsp;Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a skilled Executive Administrative Assistant to deliver efficient secretarial and administrative support in a well-organized and timely manner.
	This role involves working closely with executives, handling various tasks to streamline their work and communications. As an individual contributor, you will provide personalized assistance, ensuring smooth operations and effective communication.&nbsp;
	Your responsibilities will range from managing schedules and correspondence to organizing meetings and maintaining confidentiality.
	We require someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and possesses exceptional organizational and communication skills. Join our team and contribute to the success of our executives and the overall efficiency of our organization.


Responsibilities


	Act as the point of contact between the executives and internal/external clients
	Undertake the tasks of receiving calls, take messages and routing correspondence
	Handle requests and queries appropriately
	Maintain diary, arrange meetings and appointments and provide reminders
	Make travel arrangements
	Take dictation and minutes and accurately enter data
	Monitor office supplies and research advantageous deals or suppliers
	Produce reports, presentations and briefs
	Develop and carry out an efficient documentation and filing system.


Requirements


	High School degree; additional qualification as personal assistant would be considered an&nbsp;advantage
	Proven experience as an Executive Administrative Assistant, Senior Executive Assistant or in other secretarial position
	Full comprehension of office management systems and procedures
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office
	Proficiency in English
	Exemplary planning and time management skills
	Up-to-date with advancements in office gadgets and applications
	Ability to multitask and prioritize daily workload
	High level verbal and written communications skills
	Discretion and confidentiality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;quadolaadvisoryhrservicesltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "name": "",
    "value": "198045"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Executive Administrative Assistant Job at Quadri Advisory HR Services




        
    

        
        ‎Quadri Advisory HR Services is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled Executive Administrative Assistant to deliver efficient secretarial and administrative support in a well-organized and timely manner.
	This role involves working closely with executives, handling various tasks to streamline their work and communications. As an individual contributor, you will provide personalized assistance, ensuring smooth operations and effective communication. 
	Your responsibilities will range from managing schedules and correspondence to organizing meetings and maintaining confidentiality.
	We require someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and possesses exceptional organizational and communication skills. Join our team and contribute to the success of our executives and the overall efficiency of our organization.


Responsibilities


	Act as the point of contact between the executives and internal/external clients
	Undertake the tasks of receiving calls, take messages and routing correspondence
	Handle requests and queries appropriately
	Maintain diary, arrange meetings and appointments and provide reminders
	Make travel arrangements
	Take dictation and minutes and accurately enter data
	Monitor office supplies and research advantageous deals or suppliers
	Produce reports, presentations and briefs
	Develop and carry out an efficient documentation and filing system.


Requirements


	High School degree; additional qualification as personal assistant would be considered an advantage
	Proven experience as an Executive Administrative Assistant, Senior Executive Assistant or in other secretarial position
	Full comprehension of office management systems and procedures
	Excellent knowledge of MS Office
	Proficiency in English
	Exemplary planning and time management skills
	Up-to-date with advancements in office gadgets and applications
	Ability to multitask and prioritize daily workload
	High level verbal and written communications skills
	Discretion and confidentiality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fx Sales Account Manager",
  "description": "ACCM&nbsp;Global Enterprise Limited&nbsp;-&nbsp;We are a dynamic and innovative FX and CFD brokerage firm committed to providing cutting-edge trading solutions to our clients. As we continue to grow, we are seeking dynamic and motivated Sales Account Manager to join our team and grow their careers in the exciting world of forex trading.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fx Sales Account Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an ambitious and results driven Sales Account Manager with a strong interest in financial markets, trading, and client services.
	This role offers an excellent opportunity to build a successful career in Forex Brokerage Sales, while contributing to revenue growth and client satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell company products effectively to prospective and existing clients
	Meet daily call targets and convert leads into successful sales
	Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets and performance objectives
	Deliver exceptional customer experience
	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to expand client base and market share
	Identify and capitalize on new business opportunities, including partnerships with Introducing Brokers
	Analyze market trends, client needs, and competitor activities to improve sales strategies
	Prepare regular sales reports, forecasts, and performance insights
	Collaborate with the marketing team on lead generation and client acquisition strategies
	Conduct market research and provide insights to support trading strategies
	Participate in training programs and continuous professional development
	Support operational efficiency by assisting with back-office functions when required.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in FX/Forex sales or a similar role
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Strong interest in financial markets, trading, and investments
	Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, Zoho CRM, or HubSpot
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Excellent organizational and time management abilities
	Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving skills
	Familiarity with trading platforms is an added advantage
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary with performance-based incentives
	Health and wellness benefits (HMO)
	A dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Exposure to international financial markets and trading platforms
	Career growth and continuous learning opportunities.


&nbsp;Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send theirCV and a cover letter to:&nbsp;modinat@accmfx.com&nbsp;using &quot;Sales Account Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: If you are passionate about building a career in financial markets and sales, we would love to hear from you.",

Fx Sales Account Manager Job at ACCM Global Enterprise Limited




        
    

        
        ACCM Global Enterprise Limited - We are a dynamic and innovative FX and CFD brokerage firm committed to providing cutting-edge trading solutions to our clients. As we continue to grow, we are seeking dynamic and motivated Sales Account Manager to join our team and grow their careers in the exciting world of forex trading.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fx Sales Account Manager

Job Location:  Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an ambitious and results driven Sales Account Manager with a strong interest in financial markets, trading, and client services.
	This role offers an excellent opportunity to build a successful career in Forex Brokerage Sales, while contributing to revenue growth and client satisfaction.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell company products effectively to prospective and existing clients
	Meet daily call targets and convert leads into successful sales
	Achieve and exceed monthly sales targets and performance objectives
	Deliver exceptional customer experience
	Develop and execute strategic sales plans to expand client base and market share
	Identify and capitalize on new business opportunities, including partnerships with Introducing Brokers
	Analyze market trends, client needs, and competitor activities to improve sales strategies
	Prepare regular sales reports, forecasts, and performance insights
	Collaborate with the marketing team on lead generation and client acquisition strategies
	Conduct market research and provide insights to support trading strategies
	Participate in training programs and continuous professional development
	Support operational efficiency by assisting with back-office functions when required.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related fields
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in FX/Forex sales or a similar role
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets
	Strong interest in financial markets, trading, and investments
	Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, Zoho CRM, or HubSpot
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Excellent organizational and time management abilities
	Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving skills
	Familiarity with trading platforms is an added advantage
	Ability to work in a fast-paced, target-driven environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary with performance-based incentives
	Health and wellness benefits (HMO)
	A dynamic and collaborative work environment
	Exposure to international financial markets and trading platforms
	Career growth and continuous learning opportunities.


 Method of Application 

Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send theirCV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Sales Account Manager" as the subject of the email.

Note: If you are passionate about building a career in financial markets and sales, we would love to hear from you.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Logistics Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ajah, Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Working Days: 23 days a month.

Job Description


	We are looking for a talented logistics manager to join our team. In this position, you will be responsible for planning deliveries and supervising drivers to deliver our cakes on time.


Responsibilities


	Planning and monitoring outgoing deliveries.
	Develop new strategies to streamline processes and reduce costs.
	Supervising logistics, transportation, and customer delivery.
	Organize workspace, label goods, plot routes, and process shipments.
	Must be computer literate.
	Should be able to use ride-hailing apps like Uber and Bolt.
	Should be conversant with locations within Ajah


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree qualification with at least 2 years of work experience.
	Candidate must reside in or around Ajah
	Pay close attention to details
	Sound knowledge of shipping processes and metrics.
	Strong communication, memorization, and teamwork skills.
	Capacity to perform your duties diligently, particularly during stressful situations.
	Must be able to work on some Sundays and holidays.
	Work from the office 23 days a month
	Should be willing to work with the company long term.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;admin@fastestcakes.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Logistics Manager Job at Fastest Cakes Limited




        
    

        
        Fastest Cakes is a registered brand in Nigeria that focuses on delivering awesome and affordable cakes very fast. The company is deeply committed to ensuring that ordering and getting cakes for occasions is seamless and fun. The core team has some serious experience and has successfully produced and delivered over 10,000 cakes unscathed in Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Job type: Full-time
Working Days: 23 days a month.

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a talented logistics manager to join our team. In this position, you will be responsible for planning deliveries and supervising drivers to deliver our cakes on time.


Responsibilities


	Planning and monitoring outgoing deliveries.
	Develop new strategies to streamline processes and reduce costs.
	Supervising logistics, transportation, and customer delivery.
	Organize workspace, label goods, plot routes, and process shipments.
	Must be computer literate.
	Should be able to use ride-hailing apps like Uber and Bolt.
	Should be conversant with locations within Ajah


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree qualification with at least 2 years of work experience.
	Candidate must reside in or around Ajah
	Pay close attention to details
	Sound knowledge of shipping processes and metrics.
	Strong communication, memorization, and teamwork skills.
	Capacity to perform your duties diligently, particularly during stressful situations.
	Must be able to work on some Sundays and holidays.
	Work from the office 23 days a month
	Should be willing to work with the company long term.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

title: Social Media and Content Manager Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency is a licensed full-fledged Human Resource firm with extensive expertise and experience in human Capital development and staffing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Manager

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type:  Full-Time (Hybrid 2 days onsite)
Industry: Consulting & Marketing

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for a Social Media & Content Manager to take charge of our online presence — creating engaging posts, managing pages, and driving brand growth across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and more.


What You’ll Do


	Manage and grow all company social media platforms.
	Create engaging content (graphics, videos, captions, blogs).
	Plan content calendars and run paid ad campaigns.
	Monitor performance and optimize engagement.
	Stay on top of trends and keep our brand voice fresh.


What We’re Looking For


	2+ years of experience in social media management and content creation.
	Skilled in Canva, CapCut, or similar design/video tools.
	Great communication and storytelling skills.
	A creative, proactive, and trend-savvy mindset.


Salary
N150,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Social Media & Content Manager" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Manager",
  "description": "Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced Business Manager to oversee the daily operations of the company, ensuring seamless coordination across production, sales, and administrative functions.
	This role involves driving business growth, managing performance, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards within the herbal drug manufacturing environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operations of all departments and ensure activities are aligned with company objectives.
	Serve as the primary point of coordination between the MD and departmental heads.
	Monitor departmental performance against set targets and escalate issues to the MD where necessary.
	Support the MD in budget preparation, financial planning, and periodic business reviews.
	Ensure compliance with all company policies, standard operating procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Manage vendor and supplier relationships in collaboration with the Production and Logistics departments.
	Oversee staff management activities including performance tracking, discipline, and coordination with the HR/Admin Manager.
	Coordinate the resolution of operational challenges that cut across departments.
	Prepare management reports for the MD on a regular basis, covering key business performance indicators.
	Support business development efforts as directed by the MD.
	Perform any other duties or responsibilities as assigned by the Managing Director.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management or related field.
	5&ndash;7 years of experience in business operations or management.
	Strong leadership, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Excellent communication and problem-solving abilities.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@eandg.com.ng&nbsp;or&nbsp;eandg.tprecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  },

Business Manager Job at Excel and Grace Consulting




        
    

        
        Excel and Grace Consulting is a fast-paced business consulting organization with a track record of delivering exceptional business solutions to small and medium-scale enterprises in Nigeria, Ghana, Germany, Switzerland, Canada, etc. We are certified management consultants with the International Council of Management Consulting Institutes (CMC-Global) with over 18 years of experience. Our team of experts and consultants have authored over 20 books on business management, business structure, business operations, human resources, organizational structure, employee development, money management, and so on.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an experienced Business Manager to oversee the daily operations of the company, ensuring seamless coordination across production, sales, and administrative functions.
	This role involves driving business growth, managing performance, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards within the herbal drug manufacturing environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the daily operations of all departments and ensure activities are aligned with company objectives.
	Serve as the primary point of coordination between the MD and departmental heads.
	Monitor departmental performance against set targets and escalate issues to the MD where necessary.
	Support the MD in budget preparation, financial planning, and periodic business reviews.
	Ensure compliance with all company policies, standard operating procedures, and regulatory requirements.
	Manage vendor and supplier relationships in collaboration with the Production and Logistics departments.
	Oversee staff management activities including performance tracking, discipline, and coordination with the HR/Admin Manager.
	Coordinate the resolution of operational challenges that cut across departments.
	Prepare management reports for the MD on a regular basis, covering key business performance indicators.
	Support business development efforts as directed by the MD.
	Perform any other duties or responsibilities as assigned by the Managing Director.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management or related field.
	5–7 years of experience in business operations or management.
	Strong leadership, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Excellent communication and problem-solving abilities.


Salary
N350,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
